description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for GCP VPC networking. Tracks firewall rules, VPC flow logs, Cloud NAT, VPC peering, Cloud Interconnect, load balancer metrics, DNS queries, and subnet utilization via Google Cloud Monitoring exporter.
title: GCP VPC Metrics

8b11b51d-fde6-4e81-b84b-1b91eca71dae.name: project_id
8b11b51d-fde6-4e81-b84b-1b91eca71dae.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%networking%'

742f742a-f5df-4fa6-9d49-4f2e5ed8df9b.name: network_name
742f742a-f5df-4fa6-9d49-4f2e5ed8df9b.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'network_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%networking%'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id') = '{{.project_id}}'
